debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
hr : r ≥ 0
⊢ HasFiniteIntegral (Φ₆ r) (volume.restrict (Ici 1))

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
-- Use the fact that Φ₆ is bounded by a decaying exponential to show the integral is finite
  have h₁ : HasFiniteIntegral (Φ₆ r) (volume.restrict (Ici (1 : ℝ))) := by
    have h₂ : (fun x : ℝ => Φ₆ r x) = (fun x : ℝ => Φ₆ r x) := rfl
    have h₃ : ∀ (x : ℝ), x ∈ Ici (1 : ℝ) → Φ₆ r x = C₆ r x := by
      intro x hx
      simp [hx, Ici]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try simp_all [C₆, Φ₆]) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try field_simp) <;>
      (try linarith)
    -- Use the fact that C₆ is integrable to show that Φ₆ is integrable
    have h₄ : HasFiniteIntegral (C₆ r) (volume.restrict (Ici (1 : ℝ))) := by
      have h₅ : HasFiniteIntegral (C₆ r) (volume.restrict (Ici (1 : ℝ))) := by
        -- Use the fact that C₆ decays exponentially
        have h₆ : ∀ (x : ℝ), x ∈ Ici (1 : ℝ) → |C₆ r x| ≤ Real.exp (-(x - 1)) := by
          intro x hx
          have h₇ : x ≥ 1 := by simpa using hx
          have h₈ : |C₆ r x| ≤ Real.exp (-(x - 1)) := by
            -- Use the bound on C₆
            have h₉ : |C₆ r x| ≤ Real.exp (-(x - 1)) := by
              -- Prove the bound using the properties of C₆
              simp [C₆]
              <;>
              (try norm_num) <;>
              (try simp_all [Real.exp_le_exp]) <;>
              (try ring_nf) <;>
              (try field_simp) <;>
              (try linarith)
              <;>
              (try
                {
                  cases' le_total 0 (x - 1) with h h <;>
                  simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, Real.exp_neg] <;>
                  nlinarith [Real.exp_pos (-(x - 1))]
                })
            exact h₉
          exact h₈
        -- Use the comparison test to show that C₆ is integrable
        have h₉ : HasFiniteIntegral (fun x : ℝ => (Real.exp (-(x - 1)) : ℝ)) (volume.restrict (Ici (1 : ℝ))) := by
          -- The integral of exp(-(x - 1)) from 1 to ∞ is finite
          have h₁₀ : HasFiniteIntegral (fun x : ℝ => (Real.exp (-(x - 1)) : ℝ)) (volume.restrict (Ici (1 : ℝ))) := by
            -- Use the fact that the integral of exp(-x) from 0 to ∞ is 1
            have h₁₁ : HasFiniteIntegral (fun x : ℝ => Real.exp (-x)) (volume.restrict (Ici (0 : ℝ))) := by
              -- Use the fact that exp(-x) is integrable on [0, ∞)
              simpa using Real.hasFiniteIntegral_exp_neg_Ici 0
            -- Shift the integral to [1, ∞)
            have h₁₂ : HasFiniteIntegral (fun x : ℝ => Real.exp (-(x - 1))) (volume.restrict (Ici (1 : ℝ))) := by
              -- Use the substitution y = x - 1
              have h₁₃ : HasFiniteIntegral (fun x : ℝ => Real.exp (-(x - 1))) (volume.restrict (Ici (1 : ℝ))) :=
                (h₁₁.comp_injective (fun x => x + 1) (by
                  intro x y h
                  simp_all [sub_eq_add_neg]
                  <;> linarith
                )).congr_set (by
                  -- Show that the substitution maps [1, ∞) to [0, ∞)
                  ext x
                  simp [Set.mem_Ici]
                  <;>
                  (try
                    {
                      constructor <;> intro h <;>
                      (try { linarith }) <;>
                      (try { use x - 1 <;> linarith })
                    })
                )
              exact h₁₃
            exact h₁₂
          exact h₁₀
        -- Use the comparison test to show that C₆ is integrable
        have h₁₀ : HasFiniteIntegral (C₆ r) (volume.restrict (Ici (1 : ℝ))) := by
          -- Use the fact that |C₆ r x| ≤ exp(-(x - 1))
          refine' HasFiniteIntegral.of_abs_le _ h₉
          intro x hx
          have h₁₁ : x ≥ 1 := by simpa using hx
          have h₁₂ : |C₆ r x| ≤ Real.exp (-(x - 1)) := h₆ x hx
          simpa [abs_le] using h₁₂
        exact h₁₀
      exact h₅
    -- Use the fact that Φ₆ = C₆ on [1, ∞) to show that Φ₆ is integrable
    have h₅ : HasFiniteIntegral (Φ₆ r) (volume.restrict (Ici (1 : ℝ))) := by
      have h₆ : ∀ᵐ (x : ℝ) ∂volume.restrict (Ici (1 : ℝ)), Φ₆ r x = C₆ r x := by
        filter_upwards [ae_restrict_mem measurableSet_Ici] with x hx
        have h₇ : x ∈ Ici (1 : ℝ) := hx
        have h₈ : Φ₆ r x = C₆ r x := h₃ x h₇
        exact h₈
      have h₇ : HasFiniteIntegral (Φ₆ r) (volume.restrict (Ici (1 : ℝ))) := by
        apply HasFiniteIntegral.congr_set_ae h₆
        exact h₄
      exact h₇
    exact h₅
  exact h₁
